# Project Overview

## Introduction

This project aims to build a better markdown editor.

## Goals

- Ship version 1 by Q3
- Achieve 100 daily active users
- Support three AI providers

scenarios.docAfter:
# Technical Spec
## Introduction
This is a technical specification document for a markdown editor. It outlines the features, functionality, and usage guidelines for our new markdown editor. 

The purpose of this document is to provide a detailed description of the markdown editor's architecture, including its core components and interfaces.
## Architecture

The system uses three layers.

## [Q1 Goals](#q1-goals)
• Improve caching to reduce query times by 30%.
• Enhance AI-powered summarization algorithm for more accurate results.
• Introduce a new filtering mechanism for faster document sorting.
